series_metadata.series_description: The rosters or reports by a training agency of the individuals who completed or failed to complete a training agency course.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist, then the paper record shall be destroyed three years after the course was held. ; Electronic: The record shall be destroyed three years after the course was held., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
